title: The Big Issues survey – let us know what you think - Jon Trickett
meta_description: A strong Yorkshire voice for Hemsworth constituency
headings: h2: Jon Trickett A strong Yorkshire voice for Hemsworth constituency
text_excerpt: The Big Issues survey – let us know what you think - Jon Trickett Join Get Involved Donate Jon Trickett A strong Yorkshire voice for Hemsworth constituency About Contact Jon in Parliament What Jon Thinks Search Search Twitter Facebook Youtube The Big Issues survey – let us know what you think Jon Trickett MP From the many emails, letters, telephone calls as well as social media contacts I receive, it is clear people in our area are suffering as a result of 9 years of Tory austerity, yet the Government tell us things are getting better. People definitely don’t feel it around here. I have put together this survey for residents of Hemsworth Constituency and hope you will help by letting me know exactly what your big concerns are and what you think about Labour’s pledges. I hope you will take time to fill it in. With best wishes, Jon Trickett MP The Big Issues Survey Name * Street Address * Town * Postcode * Email Cost of living The price of many everyday services and purchases are rising faster than wages and income. What would you say has affected you the most? (Please tick all that apply) Food Gas/Electricity Housing Costs Petrol/Diesel Bus/Train Fares Childcare If you've been adversely affected by the rise in the State Pension Age tick this box Impacts of Austerity As we all know, Tory cuts have affected all of us in the North unfairly, which cuts have affected you? NHS Cuts Council Cuts Cuts to Welfare payments Education Cuts Cuts to Transport services Police Cuts Plans to cancel Pensioners Free TV licences Winter Fuel Allowance Cuts Pledge 1: Increased funding to the NHS to help employ more nurses and doctors The NHS is in Crisis. It is the fault of this Tory government and the failures of privatisation causing increasing A&E waiting times, fewer beds and not enough doctors and nurses. Labour will change that. We will give the NHS the funding it deserves to make sure you get the best treatment. I agree I disagree Not sure Pledge 2: A Real Living wage of £10 Labour will guarantee a real living wage of £10 as the minimum wage for everyone, including young people. This will provide the economic security people round here need. I agree I disagree I am not sure A Green New Deal that will create 400,000 jobs The climate is facing an emergency and Labour want to be part of the solution. In government we want to implement a Green New Deal that will boost our economy as well as help our environment with sustinable industries and promote renewable energy so that future generations can prosper. I agree I disagree I am not sure Pledge 4: Free School Meals Every child deserves a good meal whilst at school. That is vital to their education and development. I agree I disagree I am not sure Pledge 5: Protect the Winter fuel allowance, free TV licences and bus passes for pensioners The Tories keep toying with scrapping vital concessions that vulnerable elderly people rely on. Labour would never do that. We believe pensioners who have worked hard all their life deserve the dignity they have earnt. We will protect the Winter Fuel Allowance, free TV licences and buss passes I agree I disagree I am not sure A future General Election If there was a general election tomorrow, which political party would you vote for? If you agreed with the Labour Party's pledges then vote Labour to make them a reality Labour Conservative Lib Dem Green Ukip Other 2017 General Election Which political party did you vote for at the 2017 General Election? Labour Conservative Lib Dem Independent Other Didn't Vote Consent * Thank you for filling out my survey. Your personal information will be kept private and held securely. It will not be shared with any third-party or used for any other purpose than this petition. I agree to the privacy policy Share — Social channels Twitter Facebook Youtube Further details Promoted by and on behalf of the Labour Party at Southside, 105 Victoria Street, London SW1E 6QT ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
